case_title: BAY WEST PROPERTIES et al vs. FERRELL, LARRY et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FERRELL, LARRY JOHNSON, STEPHANIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2250 - 24TH STREET #227, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA. $725.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $725.00, STAYED UNTIL FEB-02-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFT TO VACATE BY 2/1/94 IN BROOM CLEAN COND. DEFT TO PAY $100/M STARTING 2/16/94 CASHIER'S CHK OR MONEY ORD. PAYMENT IS DELINQUENT IF NOT RCVD BY 20TH & FULL BALANCE W/ INTEREST IS DUE IMMEDIATELY. PLTF KEEPS SEC DEP. PROPERTY LEFT SHALL BE DEEMED ABANDONED. NO FURTHER STAYS. SEE FILE FOR OTHERS.
